title: Black Market Tweaks
description: Adds extra functionality to Vault Hunters' Black Market
body:
This is an addon to Vault Hunters which modifies the Black Market table. 

It: 
- Adds 2 common trades and 1 omega trade to the table
- Changes the Marketer expertise to unlock those new slots instead of adding rerolls
- Add a new (configurable) slot to the table which is used (similar to Bounty Pearls in the Bounty Table) to reroll the trades

_Developed by attackeight for Millenium VHSMP_
